title: oenothera primiveris subsp. caulescens
intro: Oenothera primiveris subsp. caulescens, also known as spring evening primrose, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Onagraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. The herbal preparations of Oenothera primiveris subsp. caulescens include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin irritations and wounds.
